skill.name: Azure.AI.OpenAI (.NET)
skill.description: Azure OpenAI SDK for .NET. Client library for Azure OpenAI and OpenAI services. Use for chat completions, embeddings, image generation, audio transcription, and assistants.
skill.summary: Comprehensive reference for Azure OpenAI .NET SDK covering chat, embeddings, DALL-E, Whisper, and function calling.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a documentation-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files with 0 risk factors detected. The SKILL.md contains code examples demonstrating legitimate Azure OpenAI SDK usage patterns including authentication, chat completions, embeddings, image generation, and audio transcription. No malicious patterns or security concerns identified.

content.user_title: Build AI apps with Azure OpenAI and .NET
content.value_statement: Developers struggle to integrate Azure OpenAI into .NET applications efficiently. This skill provides complete code examples for chat, embeddings, DALL-E, Whisper, and advanced features like RAG and function calling.
actual_capabilities: Generate chat completions using GPT-4, GPT-4o, and o1 reasoning models
Create text embeddings for semantic search and RAG applications
Generate images using DALL-E 3 with quality and style options
Transcribe audio and generate speech using Whisper models
Implement function calling for external tool integration
Configure structured JSON outputs with schema validation
limitations: Requires Azure OpenAI resource with valid endpoint and API key or Entra ID credentials
Does not handle automatic retry logic or rate limit backoff strategies
Examples assume .NET 8+ and latest Azure.AI.OpenAI package version 2.x
Does not cover Azure OpenAI quota management or cost optimization

use_cases.title: Enterprise Chat Application
use_cases.description: Build secure chat applications using Azure OpenAI with Entra ID authentication for production deployments with proper credential management.
use_cases.target_user: Enterprise developers building internal AI tools

use_cases.title: Document Search with RAG
use_cases.description: Create Retrieval Augmented Generation solutions combining Azure AI Search with Azure OpenAI for enterprise document Q&A systems.
use_cases.target_user: Solutions architects designing knowledge base systems

use_cases.title: Multimedia AI Processing
use_cases.description: Process audio files with Whisper transcription and generate images with DALL-E for content creation and accessibility features.
use_cases.target_user: Developers building accessibility or content generation tools

prompt_templates.title: Basic Chat Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a basic chat application using Azure.AI.OpenAI SDK. I have my AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT and AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY configured. Use the gpt-4o-mini deployment.
prompt_templates.scenario: Getting started with Azure OpenAI chat

prompt_templates.title: Structured JSON Response
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me how to use structured outputs with JSON schema in Azure OpenAI .NET SDK. I need the response to follow a specific format with validation for a math tutoring app.

prompt_templates.title: RAG with Azure AI Search
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to build a document Q&A system using Azure AI Search as a data source with Azure OpenAI. Show me how to configure the chat data source and handle citations.

prompt_templates.title: Function Calling Implementation
prompt_templates.prompt: Demonstrate function calling in Azure OpenAI .NET for a weather service. I need to define the function schema, handle tool calls, and execute the function with proper validation.
prompt_templates.scenario: Integrating external APIs via function calls

output_examples.input: User asks for a basic chat client setup
output_examples.output: CompleteAsync pattern with AzureOpenAIClient, DefaultAzureCredential, and GetChatClient for gpt-4o-mini deployment with streaming and non-streaming options

output_examples.input: User needs embeddings for document similarity
output_examples.output: EmbeddingClient setup with GenerateEmbeddingAsync for single text or batch processing, returning float vectors ready for cosine similarity calculations

output_examples.input: User wants audio transcription from uploaded file
output_examples.output: AudioClient with TranscribeAudioAsync, supporting MP3/WAV formats with language detection and verbose output including segment timestamps

best_practices: Use DefaultAzureCredential with Entra ID for production instead of API keys to avoid credential exposure
Reuse AzureOpenAIClient instances across requests rather than creating new clients for each operation
Implement exponential backoff retry policies for handling 429 rate limit responses from the API
anti_patterns: Hardcoding API keys or endpoints directly in source code instead of using environment variables or Azure Key Vault
Creating new client instances inside request handlers causing connection pool exhaustion and performance degradation
Not validating function tool call arguments before executing external code which could lead to injection vulnerabilities

faq.question: How do I authenticate with Azure OpenAI in production?
faq.answer: Use DefaultAzureCredential for Entra ID authentication instead of API keys. This enables managed identities in Azure and provides better security posture with automatic token refresh.

faq.question: What is the difference between Azure.AI.OpenAI and OpenAI packages?
faq.answer: Azure.AI.OpenAI is the official Azure SDK with Azure-specific features like Entra ID auth and Azure AI Search integration. The OpenAI package works with Azure endpoints using BearerTokenPolicy but lacks Azure-specific integrations.

faq.question: How do I handle streaming responses in .NET?
faq.answer: Use CompleteChatStreamingAsync and iterate with await foreach over StreamingChatCompletionUpdate. Check ContentUpdate for text chunks and accumulate for complete response.

faq.question: Can I use reasoning models like o1 with this SDK?
faq.answer: Yes. Use ChatCompletionOptions with ReasoningEffortLevel property set to Low, Medium, or High. Note that reasoning models use DeveloperChatMessage instead of SystemChatMessage.

faq.question: How do I implement retry logic for rate limits?
faq.answer: Catch RequestFailedException with Status 429 and implement exponential backoff. Read the Retry-After header from the exception response for accurate retry timing.

faq.question: What deployment name should I use for chat completions?
faq.answer: Use the deployment name you created in your Azure OpenAI resource, not the model name. For example, deploy GPT-4o-mini and reference it as GetChatClient("your-deployment-name").
